case_title: CACH, LLC VS. M E GASPARRINI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GASPARRINI, M E AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-28-2012
POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT A COPY OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GASPARRINI, M E AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
